mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS provinceId, p.province_name AS provinceName, p.longitude, p.latitude, COALESCE(h.totalCount, 0) AS totalCount, COALESCE(h.nationalCount, 0) AS nationalCount, COALESCE(h.provincialCount, 0) AS provincialCount FROM province p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT province_id, COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN level = '国家级' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nationalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN level = '省级' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS provincialCount FROM heritage GROUP BY province_id ) h ON p.id = h.province_id ORDER BY COALESCE(h.totalCount, 0) DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN level = '国家级' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nationalCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inheritor) AS inheritorCount, 44 AS unescoCount FROM heritage
